name: Groma
description: Groma, a 34-year-old Orc warrior, stands 180 cm tall with short dark hair and medium breasts. She carries a two-handed ax in her battle gear, which includes a combat tank top and leather pants. Among the orcs, Groma stands out for her relative moderation and not so bloodthirsty nature, but in battle she shows rudeness, courage and cruelty.
creator: Volkodav
